t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: APEX broker external ID. Decimal(38,0) to accommodate APEX very large numeric ID format.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: APEX broker external ID. Decimal(38,0) to accommodate APEX very large numeric ID format. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added 'Passthrough from Dim_Customer' — no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Withdrawal request ID for cashout events. 0 for non-cashout events.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Withdrawal request ID for cashout events. 0 for non-cashout events.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Payment processing ID for cashout/withdrawal events. 0 for non-cashout events. Used to deduplicate WithdrawProcessingID rows in the ETL.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Payment processing ID for cashout/withdrawal events. 0 for non-cashout events. Used to deduplicate WithdrawProcessingID rows in the ETL.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: UTC timestamp when the action occurred. For position opens: when position was opened. For logins: login time. For credits: when the credit was recorded.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: UTC timestamp when the action occurred. For credits: when the credit was recorded.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Removed position/login context irrelevant to cashout table

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Position size in currency. Must be >= 0. Stored in dollars (PositionOpen divides by 100 from cents). (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Cashout/refund/chargeback amount in USD. Passthrough from Fact_CustomerAction.Amount for cashout-related ActionTypeIDs. (Tier 1 — History.Credit)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Complete rewrite: 'Position size in currency' → 'Cashout/refund/chargeback amount in USD'. Source changed from Trade.PositionTbl to History.Credit. Contextually more accurate for cashouts but not verbatim.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Payment method name (e.g., CreditCard, Wire, PayPal, Skrill, Neteller, ApplePay, GooglePay).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Payment method name (e.g., CreditCard, Wire, PayPal, Skrill, Neteller, ApplePay, GooglePay). Resolved via Dim_BillingDepot.FundingTypeID → Dim_FundingType.Name. NULL when no matching billing withdraw row exists.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Core verbatim, added join path and NULL semantics

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable depot name (e.g., 'MoneyBookers USD', 'Neteller', 'Wire'). Unique across all depots. Used in admin dashboards, routing logs, and discrepancy reports.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable depot name (e.g., 'MoneyBookers USD', 'Neteller', 'Wire'). Unique across all depots. Used in admin dashboards, routing logs, and discrepancy reports. Resolved from Fact_BillingWithdraw.DepotID. NULL when no matching billing withdraw row exists.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Core verbatim, added join context and NULL semantics

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Card brand name. Unique constraint prevents duplicates in production. Used in payment UI, transaction records, and fraud reporting. Renamed from Name in production. 0=None, 1=Visa, 2=Master Card, 3=Diners, 4=Amex, 5=Fire Pay, 6=JCB, 7=American Express, 8=Maestro, 9=Laser, 10=Switch, 11=UK Local Credit Card, 12=Discover, 13=Local Card, 14=China Union Pay, 15=Solo, 16=Cirrus, 17=GE Capital.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Card brand name. 0=None, 1=Visa, 2=Master Card, 3=Diners, 4=Amex, 5=Fire Pay, 6=JCB, 7=American Express, 8=Maestro. Resolved from Fact_BillingWithdraw.CardTypeIDAsInteger via Dim_CardType.CarTypeName. NULL for non-card payment methods.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped: uniqueness constraint, payment UI usage note, rename note. Truncated card type list from 18 values (0-17) to 9 values (0-8), losing Laser, Switch, UK Local Credit Card, Discover, Local Card, China Union Pay, Solo, Cirrus, GE Capital.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Short code for the customer's regulatory jurisdiction at the time of the event. Values: CySEC, FCA, FSA Seychelles, FinCEN+FINRA, ASIC & GAML, FSRA, BVI, ASIC, MAS, eToroUS, FinCEN. Resolved from Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID via Dim_Regulation.Name.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Minor rewording adds point-in-time context and lists specific values — improvement, meaning preserved

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Verification code supplied or received during withdrawal processing.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Verification code supplied or received during withdrawal processing. Passthrough from Fact_BillingWithdraw.

issues.problem: Upstream Dim_CardType.CarTypeName description lists 18 card types (0-17) with production context (unique constraint, payment UI usage, rename from Name). Wiki truncates to 9 values (0-8), dropping Laser, Switch, UK Local Credit Card, Discover, Local Card, China Union Pay, Solo, Cirrus, GE Capital and all production context.

All three are passthroughs from upstream tables that have wikis (Fact_SnapshotCustomer, BI_DB_DepositWithdrawFee) but are tagged Tier 2 instead of Tier 1. IsCreditReportValidCB should be (Tier 1 — Fact_SnapshotCustomer). BaseExchangeRate and ExchangeFee should be (Tier 1 — BI_DB_DepositWithdrawFee).

Upstream Fact_CustomerAction tags Amount as '(Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)' with description 'Position size in currency.' Wiki rewrites to 'Cashout/refund/chargeback amount in USD (Tier 1 — History.Credit)'. Contextually more accurate for cashout ActionTypeIDs but not verbatim. Source attribution changed.
Missing UC Target row. Completeness checklist requires Production Source, Refresh, Distribution, and UC Target in the property table.

Upstream description includes 'For position opens: when position was opened. For logins: login time.' which was trimmed. While irrelevant to cashouts, verbatim inheritance requires preserving the full text.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Restore CardType description verbatim from Dim_CardType wiki including all 18 card types (0-17), uniqueness constraint note, and rename note. (2) Re-tag IsCreditReportValidCB as (Tier 1 — Fact_SnapshotCustomer) using upstream description. (3) Re-tag BaseExchangeRate and ExchangeFee as (Tier 1 — BI_DB_DepositWithdrawFee) using upstream descriptions. (4) For Amount, either preserve upstream verbatim with a contextual note, or document the adaptation rationale in review-needed. (5) Add UC Target row to the property table.
